_comment: Template: register the antigravity TaskSolver-backed MCP server with agy. Replace <AGYHOOK> with the absolute path to this repo's antigravity/ dir and <TASKSOLVER> with the TaskSolver repo root. The exact file agy reads (and whether it lives at ~/.antigravity, ~/.agy, ~/.config/antigravity, or a per-project .mcp.json) depends on your agy version — confirm against `agy` docs; the mcpServers schema below is the common MCP convention.
